prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-DUKCS-52PC-A-2 Product Type: UTILITY_KNIFE Brand (from catalog): vector tools Existing Title: Mini Hobby Knife Set With Case AND Blades For Carving And Whittling Description: MINI HOBBY KNIFE SET WITH CASE BLADES KIT FOR CARVING AND WHITTLING

Includes: 41 Blades; 7 Metal Handles; 1 PVC Handle; 6 Scribes And 1 Stone
Precision Knife Set Comes Organized In A Molded PVC Case
Cut; Scratch; Etch And Scrape With Supreme Accuracy
Blades Will Come With Oil Preservative On Them To Protect Them From The Elements Search Terms: utility knives utility knife blades folding razor blades edc retractable box cutter blades knives safety hobby knife set blades precision tools knives blades set clay modeling tools plastic fixed blade knife cutting tools mats set arts and crafts Features: - MINI HOBBY KNIFE SET WITH CASE AND BLADES FOR CARVING AND WHITTLING - Includes: 41 Blades; 7 Metal Handles; 1 PVC Handle; 6 Scribes And 1 Stone - Precision Knife Set Comes Organized In A Molded PVC Case Cut; Scratch; Etch And - Scrape With Supreme Accuracy Blades Will Come With Oil Preservative On Them To === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Vector Tools Mini Hobby Knife Set with Case and 41 Blades

openai.item_name: vector tools Mini Hobby Knife Set With Case And Blades

tokens.name: Hobby Knife Set With Case And Blades

anthropic.title_differentiation: 41 Blades, 7 Metal Handles, 6 Scribes, Stone, Molded PVC Case, Carving And Whittling

openai.title_differentiation: 41 Blades, 7 Metal Handles, 1 PVC Handle, 6 Scribes, 1 Stone, Molded PVC Case, Precision Carving And Whittling
